2480 float delta = (d - mean).count();
2481 accum += delta * delta;
2482 };
2483
2484 return Dur(sqrtf(accum / (v.size() - 1)));
2485}
2486
2487void GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::TestPacketSpeed(const uint32_t num_packets,
2488 uint32_t max_send,
2489 uint32_t max_recv,
2490 uint64_t recv_amount,
2491 bool json, Stream &strm) {
2492
2493 if (SendSpeedTestPacket(0, 0)) {
2494 StreamString packet;
2495 if (json)
2496 strm.Printf("{ \"packet_speeds\" : {\n \"num_packets\" : %u,\n "
2497 "\"results\" : [",
2498 num_packets);
2499 else
2500 strm.Printf("Testing sending %u packets of various sizes:\n",
2501 num_packets);
2502 strm.Flush();
2503
2504 uint32_t result_idx = 0;
2505 uint32_t send_size;
2506 std::vector<duration<float>> packet_times;
2507
2508 for (send_size = 0; send_size <= max_send;
2509 send_size ? send_size *= 2 : send_size = 4) {
2510 for (uint32_t recv_size = 0; recv_size <= max_recv;
2511 recv_size ? recv_size *= 2 : recv_size = 4) {
2512 MakeSpeedTestPacket(packet, send_size, recv_size);
2513
2514 packet_times.clear();
2515 // Test how long it takes to send 'num_packets' packets
2516 const auto start_time = steady_clock::now();
2517 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < num_packets; ++i) {
2518 const auto packet_start_time = steady_clock::now();
2519 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2520 SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet.GetString(), response);
2521 const auto packet_end_time = steady_clock::now();
2522 packet_times.push_back(packet_end_time - packet_start_time);
2523 }
2524 const auto end_time = steady_clock::now();
2525 const auto total_time = end_time - start_time;
2526
2527 float packets_per_second =
2528 ((float)num_packets) / duration<float>(total_time).count();
2529 auto average_per_packet = num_packets > 0 ? total_time / num_packets
2530 : duration<float>::zero();
2531 const duration<float> standard_deviation =
2532 calculate_standard_deviation(packet_times);
2533 if (json) {
2534 strm.Format("{0}\n {{\"send_size\" : {1,6}, \"recv_size\" : "
2535 "{2,6}, \"total_time_nsec\" : {3,12:ns-}, "
2536 "\"standard_deviation_nsec\" : {4,9:ns-f0}}",
2537 result_idx > 0 ? "," : "", send_size, recv_size,
2538 total_time, standard_deviation);
2539 ++result_idx;
2540 } else {
2541 strm.Format("qSpeedTest(send={0,7}, recv={1,7}) in {2:s+f9} for "
2542 "{3,9:f2} packets/s ({4,10:ms+f6} per packet) with "
2543 "standard deviation of {5,10:ms+f6}\n",
2544 send_size, recv_size, duration<float>(total_time),
2545 packets_per_second, duration<float>(average_per_packet),
2546 standard_deviation);
2547 }
2548 strm.Flush();
2549 }
2550 }
2551
2552 const float k_recv_amount_mb = (float)recv_amount / (1024.0f * 1024.0f);
2553 if (json)
2554 strm.Printf("\n ]\n },\n \"download_speed\" : {\n \"byte_size\" "
2555 ": %" PRIu64 ",\n \"results\" : [",
2556 recv_amount);
2557 else
2558 strm.Printf("Testing receiving %2.1fMB of data using varying receive "
2559 "packet sizes:\n",
2560 k_recv_amount_mb);
2561 strm.Flush();
2562 send_size = 0;
2563 result_idx = 0;
2564 for (uint32_t recv_size = 32; recv_size <= max_recv; recv_size *= 2) {
2565 MakeSpeedTestPacket(packet, send_size, recv_size);
2566
2567 // If we have a receive size, test how long it takes to receive 4MB of
2568 // data
2569 if (recv_size > 0) {
2570 const auto start_time = steady_clock::now();
2571 uint32_t bytes_read = 0;
2572 uint32_t packet_count = 0;
2573 while (bytes_read < recv_amount) {
2574 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2575 SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet.GetString(), response);
2576 bytes_read += recv_size;
2577 ++packet_count;
2578 }
2579 const auto end_time = steady_clock::now();
2580 const auto total_time = end_time - start_time;
2581 float mb_second = ((float)recv_amount) /
2582 duration<float>(total_time).count() /
2583 (1024.0 * 1024.0);
2584 float packets_per_second =
2585 ((float)packet_count) / duration<float>(total_time).count();
2586 const auto average_per_packet = packet_count > 0
2587 ? total_time / packet_count
2588 : duration<float>::zero();
2589
2590 if (json) {
2591 strm.Format("{0}\n {{\"send_size\" : {1,6}, \"recv_size\" : "
2592 "{2,6}, \"total_time_nsec\" : {3,12:ns-}}",
2593 result_idx > 0 ? "," : "", send_size, recv_size,
2594 total_time);
2595 ++result_idx;
2596 } else {
2597 strm.Format("qSpeedTest(send={0,7}, recv={1,7}) {2,6} packets needed "
2598 "to receive {3:f1}MB in {4:s+f9} for {5} MB/sec for "
2599 "{6,9:f2} packets/sec ({7,10:ms+f6} per packet)\n",
2600 send_size, recv_size, packet_count, k_recv_amount_mb,
2601 duration<float>(total_time), mb_second,
2602 packets_per_second, duration<float>(average_per_packet));
2603 }
2604 strm.Flush();
2605 }
2606 }
2607 if (json)
2608 strm.Printf("\n ]\n }\n}\n");
2609 else
2610 strm.EOL();
2611 }
2612}
2613
2614bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendSpeedTestPacket(uint32_t send_size,
2615 uint32_t recv_size) {
2616 StreamString packet;
2617 packet.Printf("qSpeedTest:response_size:%i;data:", recv_size);
2618 uint32_t bytes_left = send_size;
2619 while (bytes_left > 0) {
2620 if (bytes_left >= 26) {
2621 packet.PutCString("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz");
2622 bytes_left -= 26;
2623 } else {
2624 packet.Printf("%*.*s;", bytes_left, bytes_left,
2625 "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz");
2626 bytes_left = 0;
2627 }
2628 }
2629
2630 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2631 return SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet.GetString(), response) ==
2632 PacketResult::Success;
2633}
2634
2635bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::LaunchGDBServer(
2636 const char *remote_accept_hostname, lldb::pid_t &pid, uint16_t &port,
2637 std::string &socket_name) {
2638 pid = LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID;
2639 port = 0;
2640 socket_name.clear();
2641
2642 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2643 StreamString stream;
2644 stream.PutCString("qLaunchGDBServer;");
2645 std::string hostname;
2646 if (remote_accept_hostname && remote_accept_hostname[0])
2647 hostname = remote_accept_hostname;
2648 else {
2649 if (HostInfo::GetHostname(hostname)) {
2650 // Make the GDB server we launch only accept connections from this host
2651 stream.Printf("host:%s;", hostname.c_str());
2652 } else {
2653 // Make the GDB server we launch accept connections from any host since
2654 // we can't figure out the hostname
2655 stream.Printf("host:*;");
2656 }
2657 }
2658 // give the process a few seconds to startup
2659 ScopedTimeout timeout(*this, seconds(10));
2660
2661 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
2662 PacketResult::Success) {
2663 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
2664 return false;
2665
2666 llvm::StringRef name;
2667 llvm::StringRef value;
2668 while (response.GetNameColonValue(name, value)) {
2669 if (name == "port")
2670 value.getAsInteger(0, port);
2671 else if (name == "pid")
2672 value.getAsInteger(0, pid);
2673 else if (name.compare("socket_name") == 0) {
2674 StringExtractor extractor(value);
2675 extractor.GetHexByteString(socket_name);
2676 }
2677 }
2678 return true;
2679 }
2680 return false;
2681}
2682
2683size_t GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::QueryGDBServer(
2684 std::vector<std::pair<uint16_t, std::string>> &connection_urls) {
2685 connection_urls.clear();
2686
2687 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2688 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse("qQueryGDBServer", response) !=
2689 PacketResult::Success)
2690 return 0;
2691
2692 StructuredData::ObjectSP data =
2693 StructuredData::ParseJSON(response.GetStringRef());
2694 if (!data)
2695 return 0;
2696
2697 StructuredData::Array *array = data->GetAsArray();
2698 if (!array)
2699 return 0;
2700
2701 for (size_t i = 0, count = array->GetSize(); i < count; ++i) {
2702 std::optional<StructuredData::Dictionary *> maybe_element =
2703 array->GetItemAtIndexAsDictionary(i);
2704 if (!maybe_element)
2705 continue;
2706
2707 StructuredData::Dictionary *element = *maybe_element;
2708 uint16_t port = 0;
2709 if (StructuredData::ObjectSP port_osp =
2710 element->GetValueForKey(llvm::StringRef("port")))
2711 port = port_osp->GetUnsignedIntegerValue(0);
2712
2713 std::string socket_name;
2714 if (StructuredData::ObjectSP socket_name_osp =
2715 element->GetValueForKey(llvm::StringRef("socket_name")))
2716 socket_name = std::string(socket_name_osp->GetStringValue());
2717
2718 if (port != 0 || !socket_name.empty())
2719 connection_urls.emplace_back(port, socket_name);
2720 }
2721 return connection_urls.size();
2722}
2723
2724bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::KillSpawnedProcess(lldb::pid_t pid) {
2725 StreamString stream;
2726 stream.Printf("qKillSpawnedProcess:%" PRId64, pid);
2727
2728 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2729 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
2730 PacketResult::Success) {
2731 if (response.IsOKResponse())
2732 return true;
2733 }
2734 return false;
2735}
2736
2737std::optional<PidTid> GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendSetCurrentThreadPacket(
2738 uint64_t tid, uint64_t pid, char op) {
2739 lldb_private::StreamString packet;
2740 packet.PutChar('H');
2741 packet.PutChar(op);
2742
2743 if (pid != LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID)
2744 packet.Printf("p%" PRIx64 ".", pid);
2745
2746 if (tid == UINT64_MAX)
2747 packet.PutCString("-1");
2748 else
2749 packet.Printf("%" PRIx64, tid);
2750
2751 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2752 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet.GetString(), response) ==
2753 PacketResult::Success) {
2754 if (response.IsOKResponse())
2755 return {{pid, tid}};
2756
2757 /*
2758 * Connected bare-iron target (like YAMON gdb-stub) may not have support for
2759 * Hg packet.
2760 * The reply from '?' packet could be as simple as 'S05'. There is no packet
2761 * which can
2762 * give us pid and/or tid. Assume pid=tid=1 in such cases.
2763 */
2764 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse() && IsConnected())
2765 return {{1, 1}};
2766 }
2767 return std::nullopt;
2768}
2769
2770bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SetCurrentThread(uint64_t tid,
2771 uint64_t pid) {
2772 if (m_curr_tid == tid &&
2773 (m_curr_pid == pid || LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID == pid))
2774 return true;
2775
2776 std::optional<PidTid> ret = SendSetCurrentThreadPacket(tid, pid, 'g');
2777 if (ret) {
2778 if (ret->pid != LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID)
2779 m_curr_pid = ret->pid;
2780 m_curr_tid = ret->tid;
2781 }
2782 return ret.has_value();
2783}
2784
2785bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SetCurrentThreadForRun(uint64_t tid,
2786 uint64_t pid) {
2787 if (m_curr_tid_run == tid &&
2788 (m_curr_pid_run == pid || LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID == pid))
2789 return true;
2790
2791 std::optional<PidTid> ret = SendSetCurrentThreadPacket(tid, pid, 'c');
2792 if (ret) {
2793 if (ret->pid != LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID)
2794 m_curr_pid_run = ret->pid;
2795 m_curr_tid_run = ret->tid;
2796 }
2797 return ret.has_value();
2798}
2799
2800bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetStopReply(
2801 StringExtractorGDBRemote &response) {
2802 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse("?", response) == PacketResult::Success)
2803 return response.IsNormalResponse();
2804 return false;
2805}
2806
2807bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetThreadStopInfo(
2808 lldb::tid_t tid, StringExtractorGDBRemote &response) {
2809 if (m_supports_qThreadStopInfo) {
2810 char packet[256];
2811 int packet_len =
2812 ::snprintf(packet, sizeof(packet), "qThreadStopInfo%" PRIx64, tid);
2813 assert(packet_len < (int)sizeof(packet));
2814 UNUSED_IF_ASSERT_DISABLED(packet_len);
2815 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet, response) ==
2816 PacketResult::Success) {
2817 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse())
2818 m_supports_qThreadStopInfo = false;
2819 else if (response.IsNormalResponse())
2820 return true;
2821 else
2822 return false;
2823 } else {
2824 m_supports_qThreadStopInfo = false;
2825 }
2826 }
2827 return false;
2828}
2829
2830uint8_t GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendGDBStoppointTypePacket(
2831 GDBStoppointType type, bool insert, addr_t addr, uint32_t length,
2832 std::chrono::seconds timeout) {
2833 Log *log = GetLog(LLDBLog::Breakpoints);
2834 LLDB_LOGF(log, "GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::%s() %s at addr = 0x%" PRIx64,
2835 __FUNCTION__, insert ? "add" : "remove", addr);
2836
2837 // Check if the stub is known not to support this breakpoint type
2838 if (!SupportsGDBStoppointPacket(type))
2839 return UINT8_MAX;
2840 // Construct the breakpoint packet
2841 char packet[64];
2842 const int packet_len =
2843 ::snprintf(packet, sizeof(packet), "%c%i,%" PRIx64 ",%x",
2844 insert ? 'Z' : 'z', type, addr, length);
2845 // Check we haven't overwritten the end of the packet buffer
2846 assert(packet_len + 1 < (int)sizeof(packet));
2847 UNUSED_IF_ASSERT_DISABLED(packet_len);
2848 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2849 // Make sure the response is either "OK", "EXX" where XX are two hex digits,
2850 // or "" (unsupported)
2851 response.SetResponseValidatorToOKErrorNotSupported();
2852 // Try to send the breakpoint packet, and check that it was correctly sent
2853 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet, response, timeout) ==
2854 PacketResult::Success) {
2855 // Receive and OK packet when the breakpoint successfully placed
2856 if (response.IsOKResponse())
2857 return 0;
2858
2859 // Status while setting breakpoint, send back specific error
2860 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
2861 return response.GetError();
2862
2863 // Empty packet informs us that breakpoint is not supported
2864 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse()) {
2865 // Disable this breakpoint type since it is unsupported
2866 switch (type) {
2867 case eBreakpointSoftware:
2868 m_supports_z0 = false;
2869 break;
2870 case eBreakpointHardware:
2871 m_supports_z1 = false;
2872 break;
2873 case eWatchpointWrite:
2874 m_supports_z2 = false;
2875 break;
2876 case eWatchpointRead:
2877 m_supports_z3 = false;
2878 break;
2879 case eWatchpointReadWrite:
2880 m_supports_z4 = false;
2881 break;
2882 case eStoppointInvalid:
2883 return UINT8_MAX;
2884 }
2885 }
2886 }
2887 // Signal generic failure
2888 return UINT8_MAX;
2889}
2890
2891std::vector<std::pair<lldb::pid_t, lldb::tid_t>>
2892GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetCurrentProcessAndThreadIDs(
2893 bool &sequence_mutex_unavailable) {
2894 std::vector<std::pair<lldb::pid_t, lldb::tid_t>> ids;
2895
2896 Lock lock(*this);
2897 if (lock) {
2898 sequence_mutex_unavailable = false;
2899 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2900
2901 PacketResult packet_result;
2902 for (packet_result =
2903 SendPacketAndWaitForResponseNoLock("qfThreadInfo", response);
2904 packet_result == PacketResult::Success && response.IsNormalResponse();
2905 packet_result =
2906 SendPacketAndWaitForResponseNoLock("qsThreadInfo", response)) {
2907 char ch = response.GetChar();
2908 if (ch == 'l')
2909 break;
2910 if (ch == 'm') {
2911 do {
2912 auto pid_tid = response.GetPidTid(LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID);
2913 // If we get an invalid response, break out of the loop.
2914 // If there are valid tids, they have been added to ids.
2915 // If there are no valid tids, we'll fall through to the
2916 // bare-iron target handling below.
2917 if (!pid_tid)
2918 break;
2919
2920 ids.push_back(*pid_tid);
2921 ch = response.GetChar(); // Skip the command separator
2922 } while (ch == ','); // Make sure we got a comma separator
2923 }
2924 }
2925
2926 /*
2927 * Connected bare-iron target (like YAMON gdb-stub) may not have support for
2928 * qProcessInfo, qC and qfThreadInfo packets. The reply from '?' packet
2929 * could
2930 * be as simple as 'S05'. There is no packet which can give us pid and/or
2931 * tid.
2932 * Assume pid=tid=1 in such cases.
2933 */
2934 if ((response.IsUnsupportedResponse() || response.IsNormalResponse()) &&
2935 ids.size() == 0 && IsConnected()) {
2936 ids.emplace_back(1, 1);
2937 }
2938 } else {
2939 Log *log(GetLog(GDBRLog::Process | GDBRLog::Packets));
2940 LLDB_LOG(log, "error: failed to get packet sequence mutex, not sending "
2941 "packet 'qfThreadInfo'");
2942 sequence_mutex_unavailable = true;
2943 }
2944
2945 return ids;
2946}
2947
2948size_t GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetCurrentThreadIDs(
2949 std::vector<lldb::tid_t> &thread_ids, bool &sequence_mutex_unavailable) {
2950 lldb::pid_t pid = GetCurrentProcessID();
2951 thread_ids.clear();
2952
2953 auto ids = GetCurrentProcessAndThreadIDs(sequence_mutex_unavailable);
2954 if (ids.empty() || sequence_mutex_unavailable)
2955 return 0;
2956
2957 for (auto id : ids) {
2958 // skip threads that do not belong to the current process
2959 if (id.first != LLDB_INVALID_PROCESS_ID && id.first != pid)
2960 continue;
2961 if (id.second != LLDB_INVALID_THREAD_ID &&
2962 id.second != StringExtractorGDBRemote::AllThreads)
2963 thread_ids.push_back(id.second);
2964 }
2965
2966 return thread_ids.size();
2967}
2968
2969lldb::addr_t GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetShlibInfoAddr() {
2970 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
2971 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse("qShlibInfoAddr", response) !=
2972 PacketResult::Success ||
2973 !response.IsNormalResponse())
2974 return LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS;
2975 return response.GetHexMaxU64(false, LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS);
2976}
2977
2978lldb_private::Status GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::RunShellCommand(
2979 llvm::StringRef command,
2980 const FileSpec &
2981 working_dir, // Pass empty FileSpec to use the current working directory
2982 int *status_ptr, // Pass NULL if you don't want the process exit status
2983 int *signo_ptr, // Pass NULL if you don't want the signal that caused the
2984 // process to exit
2985 std::string
2986 *command_output, // Pass NULL if you don't want the command output
2987 const Timeout<std::micro> &timeout) {
2988 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
2989 stream.PutCString("qPlatform_shell:");
2990 stream.PutBytesAsRawHex8(command.data(), command.size());
2991 stream.PutChar(',');
2992 uint32_t timeout_sec = UINT32_MAX;
2993 if (timeout) {
2994 // TODO: Use chrono version of std::ceil once c++17 is available.
2995 timeout_sec = std::ceil(std::chrono::duration<double>(*timeout).count());
2996 }
2997 stream.PutHex32(timeout_sec);
2998 if (working_dir) {
2999 std::string path{working_dir.GetPath(false)};
3000 stream.PutChar(',');
3001 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3002 }
3003 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3004 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3005 PacketResult::Success) {
3006 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3007 return Status::FromErrorString("malformed reply");
3008 if (response.GetChar() != ',')
3009 return Status::FromErrorString("malformed reply");
3010 uint32_t exitcode = response.GetHexMaxU32(false, UINT32_MAX);
3011 if (exitcode == UINT32_MAX)
3012 return Status::FromErrorString("unable to run remote process");
3013 else if (status_ptr)
3014 *status_ptr = exitcode;
3015 if (response.GetChar() != ',')
3016 return Status::FromErrorString("malformed reply");
3017 uint32_t signo = response.GetHexMaxU32(false, UINT32_MAX);
3018 if (signo_ptr)
3019 *signo_ptr = signo;
3020 if (response.GetChar() != ',')
3021 return Status::FromErrorString("malformed reply");
3022 std::string output;
3023 response.GetEscapedBinaryData(output);
3024 if (command_output)
3025 command_output->assign(output);
3026 return Status();
3027 }
3028 return Status::FromErrorString("unable to send packet");
3029}
3030
3031Status GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::MakeDirectory(const FileSpec &file_spec,
3032 uint32_t file_permissions) {
3033 std::string path{file_spec.GetPath(false)};
3034 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3035 stream.PutCString("qPlatform_mkdir:");
3036 stream.PutHex32(file_permissions);
3037 stream.PutChar(',');
3038 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3039 llvm::StringRef packet = stream.GetString();
3040 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3041
3042 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet, response) != PacketResult::Success)
3043 return Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("failed to send '%s' packet",
3044 packet.str().c_str());
3045
3046 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3047 return Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("invalid response to '%s' packet",
3048 packet.str().c_str());
3049
3050 return Status(response.GetHexMaxU32(false, UINT32_MAX), eErrorTypePOSIX);
3051}
3052
3053Status
3054GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SetFilePermissions(const FileSpec &file_spec,
3055 uint32_t file_permissions) {
3056 std::string path{file_spec.GetPath(false)};
3057 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3058 stream.PutCString("qPlatform_chmod:");
3059 stream.PutHex32(file_permissions);
3060 stream.PutChar(',');
3061 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3062 llvm::StringRef packet = stream.GetString();
3063 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3064
3065 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet, response) != PacketResult::Success)
3066 return Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("failed to send '%s' packet",
3067 stream.GetData());
3068
3069 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3070 return Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("invalid response to '%s' packet",
3071 stream.GetData());
3072
3073 return Status(response.GetHexMaxU32(false, UINT32_MAX), eErrorTypePOSIX);
3074}
3075
3076static int gdb_errno_to_system(int err) {
3077 switch (err) {
3078#define HANDLE_ERRNO(name, value) \
3079 case GDB_##name: \
3080 return name;
3081#include "Plugins/Process/gdb-remote/GDBRemoteErrno.def"
3082 default:
3083 return -1;
3084 }
3085}
3086
3087static uint64_t ParseHostIOPacketResponse(StringExtractorGDBRemote &response,
3088 uint64_t fail_result, Status &error) {
3089 response.SetFilePos(0);
3090 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3091 return fail_result;
3092 int32_t result = response.GetS32(-2, 16);
3093 if (result == -2)
3094 return fail_result;
3095 if (response.GetChar() == ',') {
3096 int result_errno = gdb_errno_to_system(response.GetS32(-1, 16));
3097 if (result_errno != -1)
3098 error = Status(result_errno, eErrorTypePOSIX);
3099 else
3100 error = Status(-1, eErrorTypeGeneric);
3101 } else
3102 error.Clear();
3103 return result;
3104}
3105lldb::user_id_t
3106GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::OpenFile(const lldb_private::FileSpec &file_spec,
3107 File::OpenOptions flags, mode_t mode,
3108 Status &error) {
3109 std::string path(file_spec.GetPath(false));
3110 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3111 stream.PutCString("vFile:open:");
3112 if (path.empty())
3113 return UINT64_MAX;
3114 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3115 stream.PutChar(',');
3116 stream.PutHex32(flags);
3117 stream.PutChar(',');
3118 stream.PutHex32(mode);
3119 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3120 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3121 PacketResult::Success) {
3122 return ParseHostIOPacketResponse(response, UINT64_MAX, error);
3123 }
3124 return UINT64_MAX;
3125}
3126
3127bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::CloseFile(lldb::user_id_t fd,
3128 Status &error) {
3129 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3130 stream.Printf("vFile:close:%x", (int)fd);
3131 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3132 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3133 PacketResult::Success) {
3134 return ParseHostIOPacketResponse(response, -1, error) == 0;
3135 }
3136 return false;
3137}
3138
3139std::optional<GDBRemoteFStatData>
3140GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::FStat(lldb::user_id_t fd) {
3141 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3142 stream.Printf("vFile:fstat:%" PRIx64, fd);
3143 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3144 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3145 PacketResult::Success) {
3146 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3147 return std::nullopt;
3148 int64_t size = response.GetS64(-1, 16);
3149 if (size > 0 && response.GetChar() == ';') {
3150 std::string buffer;
3151 if (response.GetEscapedBinaryData(buffer)) {
3152 GDBRemoteFStatData out;
3153 if (buffer.size() != sizeof(out))
3154 return std::nullopt;
3155 memcpy(&out, buffer.data(), sizeof(out));
3156 return out;
3157 }
3158 }
3159 }
3160 return std::nullopt;
3161}
3162
3163std::optional<GDBRemoteFStatData>
3164GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::Stat(const lldb_private::FileSpec &file_spec) {
3165 Status error;
3166 lldb::user_id_t fd = OpenFile(file_spec, File::eOpenOptionReadOnly, 0, error);
3167 if (fd == UINT64_MAX)
3168 return std::nullopt;
3169 std::optional<GDBRemoteFStatData> st = FStat(fd);
3170 CloseFile(fd, error);
3171 return st;
3172}
3173
3174// Extension of host I/O packets to get the file size.
3175lldb::user_id_t GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetFileSize(
3176 const lldb_private::FileSpec &file_spec) {
3177 if (m_supports_vFileSize) {
3178 std::string path(file_spec.GetPath(false));
3179 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3180 stream.PutCString("vFile:size:");
3181 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3182 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3183 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) !=
3184 PacketResult::Success)
3185 return UINT64_MAX;
3186
3187 if (!response.IsUnsupportedResponse()) {
3188 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3189 return UINT64_MAX;
3190 uint32_t retcode = response.GetHexMaxU64(false, UINT64_MAX);
3191 return retcode;
3192 }
3193 m_supports_vFileSize = false;
3194 }
3195
3196 // Fallback to fstat.
3197 std::optional<GDBRemoteFStatData> st = Stat(file_spec);
3198 return st ? st->gdb_st_size : UINT64_MAX;
3199}
3200
3201void GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::AutoCompleteDiskFileOrDirectory(
3202 CompletionRequest &request, bool only_dir) {
3203 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3204 stream.PutCString("qPathComplete:");
3205 stream.PutHex32(only_dir ? 1 : 0);
3206 stream.PutChar(',');
3207 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(request.GetCursorArgumentPrefix());
3208 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3209 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3210 PacketResult::Success) {
3211 StreamString strm;
3212 char ch = response.GetChar();
3213 if (ch != 'M')
3214 return;
3215 while (response.Peek()) {
3216 strm.Clear();
3217 while ((ch = response.GetHexU8(0, false)) != '\0')
3218 strm.PutChar(ch);
3219 request.AddCompletion(strm.GetString());
3220 if (response.GetChar() != ',')
3221 break;
3222 }
3223 }
3224}
3225
3226Status
3227GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetFilePermissions(const FileSpec &file_spec,
3228 uint32_t &file_permissions) {
3229 if (m_supports_vFileMode) {
3230 std::string path{file_spec.GetPath(false)};
3231 Status error;
3232 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3233 stream.PutCString("vFile:mode:");
3234 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3235 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3236 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) !=
3237 PacketResult::Success) {
3238 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("failed to send '%s' packet",
3239 stream.GetData());
3240 return error;
3241 }
3242 if (!response.IsUnsupportedResponse()) {
3243 if (response.GetChar() != 'F') {
3244 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat(
3245 "invalid response to '%s' packet", stream.GetData());
3246 } else {
3247 const uint32_t mode = response.GetS32(-1, 16);
3248 if (static_cast<int32_t>(mode) == -1) {
3249 if (response.GetChar() == ',') {
3250 int response_errno = gdb_errno_to_system(response.GetS32(-1, 16));
3251 if (response_errno > 0)
3252 error = Status(response_errno, lldb::eErrorTypePOSIX);
3253 else
3254 error = Status::FromErrorString("unknown error");
3255 } else
3256 error = Status::FromErrorString("unknown error");
3257 } else {
3258 file_permissions = mode & (S_IRWXU | S_IRWXG | S_IRWXO);
3259 }
3260 }
3261 return error;
3262 } else { // response.IsUnsupportedResponse()
3263 m_supports_vFileMode = false;
3264 }
3265 }
3266
3267 // Fallback to fstat.
3268 if (std::optional<GDBRemoteFStatData> st = Stat(file_spec)) {
3269 file_permissions = st->gdb_st_mode & (S_IRWXU | S_IRWXG | S_IRWXO);
3270 return Status();
3271 }
3272 return Status::FromErrorString("fstat failed");
3273}
3274
3275uint64_t GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::ReadFile(lldb::user_id_t fd,
3276 uint64_t offset, void *dst,
3277 uint64_t dst_len,
3278 Status &error) {
3279 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3280 stream.Printf("vFile:pread:%x,%" PRIx64 ",%" PRIx64, (int)fd, dst_len,
3281 offset);
3282 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3283 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3284 PacketResult::Success) {
3285 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3286 return 0;
3287 int64_t retcode = response.GetS64(-1, 16);
3288 if (retcode == -1) {
3289 error = Status::FromErrorString("unknown error");
3290 if (response.GetChar() == ',') {
3291 int response_errno = gdb_errno_to_system(response.GetS32(-1, 16));
3292 if (response_errno > 0)
3293 error = Status(response_errno, lldb::eErrorTypePOSIX);
3294 }
3295 return -1;
3296 }
3297 const char next = (response.Peek() ? *response.Peek() : 0);
3298 if (next == ',')
3299 return 0;
3300 if (next == ';') {
3301 response.GetChar(); // skip the semicolon
3302 std::string buffer;
3303 if (response.GetEscapedBinaryData(buffer)) {
3304 const uint64_t data_to_write =
3305 std::min<uint64_t>(dst_len, buffer.size());
3306 if (data_to_write > 0)
3307 memcpy(dst, &buffer[0], data_to_write);
3308 return data_to_write;
3309 }
3310 }
3311 }
3312 return 0;
3313}
3314
3315uint64_t GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::WriteFile(lldb::user_id_t fd,
3316 uint64_t offset,
3317 const void *src,
3318 uint64_t src_len,
3319 Status &error) {
3320 lldb_private::StreamGDBRemote stream;
3321 stream.Printf("vFile:pwrite:%x,%" PRIx64 ",", (int)fd, offset);
3322 stream.PutEscapedBytes(src, src_len);
3323 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3324 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3325 PacketResult::Success) {
3326 if (response.GetChar() != 'F') {
3327 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("write file failed");
3328 return 0;
3329 }
3330 int64_t bytes_written = response.GetS64(-1, 16);
3331 if (bytes_written == -1) {
3332 error = Status::FromErrorString("unknown error");
3333 if (response.GetChar() == ',') {
3334 int response_errno = gdb_errno_to_system(response.GetS32(-1, 16));
3335 if (response_errno > 0)
3336 error = Status(response_errno, lldb::eErrorTypePOSIX);
3337 }
3338 return -1;
3339 }
3340 return bytes_written;
3341 } else {
3342 error = Status::FromErrorString("failed to send vFile:pwrite packet");
3343 }
3344 return 0;
3345}
3346
3347Status GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::CreateSymlink(const FileSpec &src,
3348 const FileSpec &dst) {
3349 std::string src_path{src.GetPath(false)}, dst_path{dst.GetPath(false)};
3350 Status error;
3351 lldb_private::StreamGDBRemote stream;
3352 stream.PutCString("vFile:symlink:");
3353 // the unix symlink() command reverses its parameters where the dst if first,
3354 // so we follow suit here
3355 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(dst_path);
3356 stream.PutChar(',');
3357 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(src_path);
3358 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3359 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3360 PacketResult::Success) {
3361 if (response.GetChar() == 'F') {
3362 uint32_t result = response.GetHexMaxU32(false, UINT32_MAX);
3363 if (result != 0) {
3364 error = Status::FromErrorString("unknown error");
3365 if (response.GetChar() == ',') {
3366 int response_errno = gdb_errno_to_system(response.GetS32(-1, 16));
3367 if (response_errno > 0)
3368 error = Status(response_errno, lldb::eErrorTypePOSIX);
3369 }
3370 }
3371 } else {
3372 // Should have returned with 'F<result>[,<errno>]'
3373 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("symlink failed");
3374 }
3375 } else {
3376 error = Status::FromErrorString("failed to send vFile:symlink packet");
3377 }
3378 return error;
3379}
3380
3381Status GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::Unlink(const FileSpec &file_spec) {
3382 std::string path{file_spec.GetPath(false)};
3383 Status error;
3384 lldb_private::StreamGDBRemote stream;
3385 stream.PutCString("vFile:unlink:");
3386 // the unix symlink() command reverses its parameters where the dst if first,
3387 // so we follow suit here
3388 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3389 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3390 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3391 PacketResult::Success) {
3392 if (response.GetChar() == 'F') {
3393 uint32_t result = response.GetHexMaxU32(false, UINT32_MAX);
3394 if (result != 0) {
3395 error = Status::FromErrorString("unknown error");
3396 if (response.GetChar() == ',') {
3397 int response_errno = gdb_errno_to_system(response.GetS32(-1, 16));
3398 if (response_errno > 0)
3399 error = Status(response_errno, lldb::eErrorTypePOSIX);
3400 }
3401 }
3402 } else {
3403 // Should have returned with 'F<result>[,<errno>]'
3404 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormat("unlink failed");
3405 }
3406 } else {
3407 error = Status::FromErrorString("failed to send vFile:unlink packet");
3408 }
3409 return error;
3410}
3411
3412// Extension of host I/O packets to get whether a file exists.
3413bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetFileExists(
3414 const lldb_private::FileSpec &file_spec) {
3415 if (m_supports_vFileExists) {
3416 std::string path(file_spec.GetPath(false));
3417 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3418 stream.PutCString("vFile:exists:");
3419 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3420 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3421 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) !=
3422 PacketResult::Success)
3423 return false;
3424 if (!response.IsUnsupportedResponse()) {
3425 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3426 return false;
3427 if (response.GetChar() != ',')
3428 return false;
3429 bool retcode = (response.GetChar() != '0');
3430 return retcode;
3431 } else
3432 m_supports_vFileExists = false;
3433 }
3434
3435 // Fallback to open.
3436 Status error;
3437 lldb::user_id_t fd = OpenFile(file_spec, File::eOpenOptionReadOnly, 0, error);
3438 if (fd == UINT64_MAX)
3439 return false;
3440 CloseFile(fd, error);
3441 return true;
3442}
3443
3444llvm::ErrorOr<llvm::MD5::MD5Result> GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::CalculateMD5(
3445 const lldb_private::FileSpec &file_spec) {
3446 std::string path(file_spec.GetPath(false));
3447 lldb_private::StreamString stream;
3448 stream.PutCString("vFile:MD5:");
3449 stream.PutStringAsRawHex8(path);
3450 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3451 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response) ==
3452 PacketResult::Success) {
3453 if (response.GetChar() != 'F')
3454 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::illegal_byte_sequence);
3455 if (response.GetChar() != ',')
3456 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::illegal_byte_sequence);
3457 if (response.Peek() && *response.Peek() == 'x')
3458 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::no_such_file_or_directory);
3459
3460 // GDBRemoteCommunicationServerCommon::Handle_vFile_MD5 concatenates low and
3461 // high hex strings. We can't use response.GetHexMaxU64 because that can't
3462 // handle the concatenated hex string. What would happen is parsing the low
3463 // would consume the whole response packet which would give incorrect
3464 // results. Instead, we get the byte string for each low and high hex
3465 // separately, and parse them.
3466 //
3467 // An alternate way to handle this is to change the server to put a
3468 // delimiter between the low/high parts, and change the client to parse the
3469 // delimiter. However, we choose not to do this so existing lldb-servers
3470 // don't have to be patched
3471
3472 // The checksum is 128 bits encoded as hex
3473 // This means low/high are halves of 64 bits each, in otherwords, 8 bytes.
3474 // Each byte takes 2 hex characters in the response.
3475 const size_t MD5_HALF_LENGTH = sizeof(uint64_t) * 2;
3476
3477 // Get low part
3478 auto part =
3479 response.GetStringRef().substr(response.GetFilePos(), MD5_HALF_LENGTH);
3480 if (part.size() != MD5_HALF_LENGTH)
3481 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::illegal_byte_sequence);
3482 response.SetFilePos(response.GetFilePos() + part.size());
3483
3484 uint64_t low;
3485 if (part.getAsInteger(/*radix=*/16, low))
3486 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::illegal_byte_sequence);
3487
3488 // Get high part
3489 part =
3490 response.GetStringRef().substr(response.GetFilePos(), MD5_HALF_LENGTH);
3491 if (part.size() != MD5_HALF_LENGTH)
3492 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::illegal_byte_sequence);
3493 response.SetFilePos(response.GetFilePos() + part.size());
3494
3495 uint64_t high;
3496 if (part.getAsInteger(/*radix=*/16, high))
3497 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::illegal_byte_sequence);
3498
3499 llvm::MD5::MD5Result result;
3500 llvm::support::endian::write<uint64_t, llvm::endianness::little>(
3501 result.data(), low);
3502 llvm::support::endian::write<uint64_t, llvm::endianness::little>(
3503 result.data() + 8, high);
3504
3505 return result;
3506 }
3507 return std::make_error_code(std::errc::operation_canceled);
3508}
3509
3510bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::AvoidGPackets(ProcessGDBRemote *process) {
3511 // Some targets have issues with g/G packets and we need to avoid using them
3512 if (m_avoid_g_packets == eLazyBoolCalculate) {
3513 if (process) {
3514 m_avoid_g_packets = eLazyBoolNo;
3515 const ArchSpec &arch = process->GetTarget().GetArchitecture();
3516 if (arch.IsValid() &&
3517 arch.GetTriple().getVendor() == llvm::Triple::Apple &&
3518 arch.GetTriple().getOS() == llvm::Triple::IOS &&
3519 (arch.GetTriple().getArch() == llvm::Triple::aarch64 ||
3520 arch.GetTriple().getArch() == llvm::Triple::aarch64_32)) {
3521 m_avoid_g_packets = eLazyBoolYes;
3522 uint32_t gdb_server_version = GetGDBServerProgramVersion();
3523 if (gdb_server_version != 0) {
3524 const char *gdb_server_name = GetGDBServerProgramName();
3525 if (gdb_server_name && strcmp(gdb_server_name, "debugserver") == 0) {
3526 if (gdb_server_version >= 310)
3527 m_avoid_g_packets = eLazyBoolNo;
3528 }
3529 }
3530 }
3531 }
3532 }
3533 return m_avoid_g_packets == eLazyBoolYes;
3534}
3535
3536DataBufferSP GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::ReadRegister(lldb::tid_t tid,
3537 uint32_t reg) {
3538 StreamString payload;
3539 payload.Printf("p%x", reg);
3540 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3541 if (SendThreadSpecificPacketAndWaitForResponse(
3542 tid, std::move(payload), response) != PacketResult::Success ||
3543 !response.IsNormalResponse())
3544 return nullptr;
3545
3546 WritableDataBufferSP buffer_sp(
3547 new DataBufferHeap(response.GetStringRef().size() / 2, 0));
3548 response.GetHexBytes(buffer_sp->GetData(), '\xcc');
3549 return buffer_sp;
3550}
3551
3552DataBufferSP GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::ReadAllRegisters(lldb::tid_t tid) {
3553 StreamString payload;
3554 payload.PutChar('g');
3555 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3556 if (SendThreadSpecificPacketAndWaitForResponse(
3557 tid, std::move(payload), response) != PacketResult::Success ||
3558 !response.IsNormalResponse())
3559 return nullptr;
3560
3561 WritableDataBufferSP buffer_sp(
3562 new DataBufferHeap(response.GetStringRef().size() / 2, 0));
3563 response.GetHexBytes(buffer_sp->GetData(), '\xcc');
3564 return buffer_sp;
3565}
3566
3567bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::WriteRegister(lldb::tid_t tid,
3568 uint32_t reg_num,
3569 llvm::ArrayRef<uint8_t> data) {
3570 StreamString payload;
3571 payload.Printf("P%x=", reg_num);
3572 payload.PutBytesAsRawHex8(data.data(), data.size(),
3573 endian::InlHostByteOrder(),
3574 endian::InlHostByteOrder());
3575 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3576 return SendThreadSpecificPacketAndWaitForResponse(
3577 tid, std::move(payload), response) == PacketResult::Success &&
3578 response.IsOKResponse();
3579}
3580
3581bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::WriteAllRegisters(
3582 lldb::tid_t tid, llvm::ArrayRef<uint8_t> data) {
3583 StreamString payload;
3584 payload.PutChar('G');
3585 payload.PutBytesAsRawHex8(data.data(), data.size(),
3586 endian::InlHostByteOrder(),
3587 endian::InlHostByteOrder());
3588 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3589 return SendThreadSpecificPacketAndWaitForResponse(
3590 tid, std::move(payload), response) == PacketResult::Success &&
3591 response.IsOKResponse();
3592}
3593
3594bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SaveRegisterState(lldb::tid_t tid,
3595 uint32_t &save_id) {
3596 save_id = 0; // Set to invalid save ID
3597 if (m_supports_QSaveRegisterState == eLazyBoolNo)
3598 return false;
3599
3600 m_supports_QSaveRegisterState = eLazyBoolYes;
3601 StreamString payload;
3602 payload.PutCString("QSaveRegisterState");
3603 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3604 if (SendThreadSpecificPacketAndWaitForResponse(
3605 tid, std::move(payload), response) != PacketResult::Success)
3606 return false;
3607
3608 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse())
3609 m_supports_QSaveRegisterState = eLazyBoolNo;
3610
3611 const uint32_t response_save_id = response.GetU32(0);
3612 if (response_save_id == 0)
3613 return false;
3614
3615 save_id = response_save_id;
3616 return true;
3617}
3618
3619bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::RestoreRegisterState(lldb::tid_t tid,
3620 uint32_t save_id) {
3621 // We use the "m_supports_QSaveRegisterState" variable here because the
3622 // QSaveRegisterState and QRestoreRegisterState packets must both be
3623 // supported in order to be useful
3624 if (m_supports_QSaveRegisterState == eLazyBoolNo)
3625 return false;
3626
3627 StreamString payload;
3628 payload.Printf("QRestoreRegisterState:%u", save_id);
3629 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3630 if (SendThreadSpecificPacketAndWaitForResponse(
3631 tid, std::move(payload), response) != PacketResult::Success)
3632 return false;
3633
3634 if (response.IsOKResponse())
3635 return true;
3636
3637 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse())
3638 m_supports_QSaveRegisterState = eLazyBoolNo;
3639 return false;
3640}
3641
3642bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SyncThreadState(lldb::tid_t tid) {
3643 if (!GetSyncThreadStateSupported())
3644 return false;
3645
3646 StreamString packet;
3647 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3648 packet.Printf("QSyncThreadState:%4.4" PRIx64 ";", tid);
3649 return SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet.GetString(), response) ==
3650 GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success &&
3651 response.IsOKResponse();
3652}
3653
3654llvm::Expected<TraceSupportedResponse>
3655GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendTraceSupported(std::chrono::seconds timeout) {
3656 Log *log = GetLog(GDBRLog::Process);
3657
3658 StreamGDBRemote escaped_packet;
3659 escaped_packet.PutCString("jLLDBTraceSupported");
3660
3661 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3662 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(escaped_packet.GetString(), response,
3663 timeout) ==
3664 GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success) {
3665 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
3666 return response.GetStatus().ToError();
3667 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse())
3668 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3669 "jLLDBTraceSupported is unsupported");
3670
3671 return llvm::json::parse<TraceSupportedResponse>(response.Peek(),
3672 "TraceSupportedResponse");
3673 }
3674 LLDB_LOG(log, "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceSupported");
3675 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3676 "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceSupported");
3677}
3678
3679llvm::Error
3680GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendTraceStop(const TraceStopRequest &request,
3681 std::chrono::seconds timeout) {
3682 Log *log = GetLog(GDBRLog::Process);
3683
3684 StreamGDBRemote escaped_packet;
3685 escaped_packet.PutCString("jLLDBTraceStop:");
3686
3687 std::string json_string;
3688 llvm::raw_string_ostream os(json_string);
3689 os << toJSON(request);
3690
3691 escaped_packet.PutEscapedBytes(json_string.c_str(), json_string.size());
3692
3693 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3694 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(escaped_packet.GetString(), response,
3695 timeout) ==
3696 GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success) {
3697 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
3698 return response.GetStatus().ToError();
3699 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse())
3700 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3701 "jLLDBTraceStop is unsupported");
3702 if (response.IsOKResponse())
3703 return llvm::Error::success();
3704 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3705 "Invalid jLLDBTraceStart response");
3706 }
3707 LLDB_LOG(log, "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceStop");
3708 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3709 "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceStop '%s'",
3710 escaped_packet.GetData());
3711}
3712
3713llvm::Error
3714GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendTraceStart(const llvm::json::Value &params,
3715 std::chrono::seconds timeout) {
3716 Log *log = GetLog(GDBRLog::Process);
3717
3718 StreamGDBRemote escaped_packet;
3719 escaped_packet.PutCString("jLLDBTraceStart:");
3720
3721 std::string json_string;
3722 llvm::raw_string_ostream os(json_string);
3723 os << params;
3724
3725 escaped_packet.PutEscapedBytes(json_string.c_str(), json_string.size());
3726
3727 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3728 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(escaped_packet.GetString(), response,
3729 timeout) ==
3730 GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success) {
3731 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
3732 return response.GetStatus().ToError();
3733 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse())
3734 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3735 "jLLDBTraceStart is unsupported");
3736 if (response.IsOKResponse())
3737 return llvm::Error::success();
3738 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3739 "Invalid jLLDBTraceStart response");
3740 }
3741 LLDB_LOG(log, "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceStart");
3742 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3743 "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceStart '%s'",
3744 escaped_packet.GetData());
3745}
3746
3747llvm::Expected<std::string>
3748GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendTraceGetState(llvm::StringRef type,
3749 std::chrono::seconds timeout) {
3750 Log *log = GetLog(GDBRLog::Process);
3751
3752 StreamGDBRemote escaped_packet;
3753 escaped_packet.PutCString("jLLDBTraceGetState:");
3754
3755 std::string json_string;
3756 llvm::raw_string_ostream os(json_string);
3757 os << toJSON(TraceGetStateRequest{type.str()});
3758
3759 escaped_packet.PutEscapedBytes(json_string.c_str(), json_string.size());
3760
3761 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3762 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(escaped_packet.GetString(), response,
3763 timeout) ==
3764 GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success) {
3765 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
3766 return response.GetStatus().ToError();
3767 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse())
3768 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3769 "jLLDBTraceGetState is unsupported");
3770 return std::string(response.Peek());
3771 }
3772
3773 LLDB_LOG(log, "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceGetState");
3774 return llvm::createStringError(
3775 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3776 "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceGetState '%s'",
3777 escaped_packet.GetData());
3778}
3779
3780llvm::Expected<std::vector<uint8_t>>
3781GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendTraceGetBinaryData(
3782 const TraceGetBinaryDataRequest &request, std::chrono::seconds timeout) {
3783 Log *log = GetLog(GDBRLog::Process);
3784
3785 StreamGDBRemote escaped_packet;
3786 escaped_packet.PutCString("jLLDBTraceGetBinaryData:");
3787
3788 std::string json_string;
3789 llvm::raw_string_ostream os(json_string);
3790 os << toJSON(request);
3791
3792 escaped_packet.PutEscapedBytes(json_string.c_str(), json_string.size());
3793
3794 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3795 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(escaped_packet.GetString(), response,
3796 timeout) ==
3797 GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success) {
3798 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
3799 return response.GetStatus().ToError();
3800 std::string data;
3801 response.GetEscapedBinaryData(data);
3802 return std::vector<uint8_t>(data.begin(), data.end());
3803 }
3804 LLDB_LOG(log, "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceGetBinaryData");
3805 return llvm::createStringError(
3806 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
3807 "failed to send packet: jLLDBTraceGetBinaryData '%s'",
3808 escaped_packet.GetData());
3809}
3810
3811std::optional<QOffsets> GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetQOffsets() {
3812 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3813 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse("qOffsets", response) !=
3814 PacketResult::Success)
3815 return std::nullopt;
3816 if (!response.IsNormalResponse())
3817 return std::nullopt;
3818
3819 QOffsets result;
3820 llvm::StringRef ref = response.GetStringRef();
3821 const auto &GetOffset = [&] {
3822 addr_t offset;
3823 if (ref.consumeInteger(16, offset))
3824 return false;
3825 result.offsets.push_back(offset);
3826 return true;
3827 };
3828
3829 if (ref.consume_front("Text=")) {
3830 result.segments = false;
3831 if (!GetOffset())
3832 return std::nullopt;
3833 if (!ref.consume_front(";Data=") || !GetOffset())
3834 return std::nullopt;
3835 if (ref.empty())
3836 return result;
3837 if (ref.consume_front(";Bss=") && GetOffset() && ref.empty())
3838 return result;
3839 } else if (ref.consume_front("TextSeg=")) {
3840 result.segments = true;
3841 if (!GetOffset())
3842 return std::nullopt;
3843 if (ref.empty())
3844 return result;
3845 if (ref.consume_front(";DataSeg=") && GetOffset() && ref.empty())
3846 return result;
3847 }
3848 return std::nullopt;
3849}
3850
3851bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetModuleInfo(
3852 const FileSpec &module_file_spec, const lldb_private::ArchSpec &arch_spec,
3853 ModuleSpec &module_spec) {
3854 if (!m_supports_qModuleInfo)
3855 return false;
3856
3857 std::string module_path = module_file_spec.GetPath(false);
3858 if (module_path.empty())
3859 return false;
3860
3861 StreamString packet;
3862 packet.PutCString("qModuleInfo:");
3863 packet.PutStringAsRawHex8(module_path);
3864 packet.PutCString(";");
3865 const auto &triple = arch_spec.GetTriple().getTriple();
3866 packet.PutStringAsRawHex8(triple);
3867
3868 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3869 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet.GetString(), response) !=
3870 PacketResult::Success)
3871 return false;
3872
3873 if (response.IsErrorResponse())
3874 return false;
3875
3876 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse()) {
3877 m_supports_qModuleInfo = false;
3878 return false;
3879 }
3880
3881 llvm::StringRef name;
3882 llvm::StringRef value;
3883
3884 module_spec.Clear();
3885 module_spec.GetFileSpec() = module_file_spec;
3886
3887 while (response.GetNameColonValue(name, value)) {
3888 if (name == "uuid" || name == "md5") {
3889 StringExtractor extractor(value);
3890 std::string uuid;
3891 extractor.GetHexByteString(uuid);
3892 module_spec.GetUUID().SetFromStringRef(uuid);
3893 } else if (name == "triple") {
3894 StringExtractor extractor(value);
3895 std::string triple;
3896 extractor.GetHexByteString(triple);
3897 module_spec.GetArchitecture().SetTriple(triple.c_str());
3898 } else if (name == "file_offset") {
3899 uint64_t ival = 0;
3900 if (!value.getAsInteger(16, ival))
3901 module_spec.SetObjectOffset(ival);
3902 } else if (name == "file_size") {
3903 uint64_t ival = 0;
3904 if (!value.getAsInteger(16, ival))
3905 module_spec.SetObjectSize(ival);
3906 } else if (name == "file_path") {
3907 StringExtractor extractor(value);
3908 std::string path;
3909 extractor.GetHexByteString(path);
3910 module_spec.GetFileSpec() = FileSpec(path, arch_spec.GetTriple());
3911 }
3912 }
3913
3914 return true;
3915}
3916
3917static std::optional<ModuleSpec>
3918ParseModuleSpec(StructuredData::Dictionary *dict) {
3919 ModuleSpec result;
3920 if (!dict)
3921 return std::nullopt;
3922
3923 llvm::StringRef string;
3924 uint64_t integer;
3925
3926 if (!dict->GetValueForKeyAsString("uuid", string))
3927 return std::nullopt;
3928 if (!result.GetUUID().SetFromStringRef(string))
3929 return std::nullopt;
3930
3931 if (!dict->GetValueForKeyAsInteger("file_offset", integer))
3932 return std::nullopt;
3933 result.SetObjectOffset(integer);
3934
3935 if (!dict->GetValueForKeyAsInteger("file_size", integer))
3936 return std::nullopt;
3937 result.SetObjectSize(integer);
3938
3939 if (!dict->GetValueForKeyAsString("triple", string))
3940 return std::nullopt;
3941 result.GetArchitecture().SetTriple(string);
3942
3943 if (!dict->GetValueForKeyAsString("file_path", string))
3944 return std::nullopt;
3945 result.GetFileSpec() = FileSpec(string, result.GetArchitecture().GetTriple());
3946
3947 return result;
3948}
3949
3950std::optional<std::vector<ModuleSpec>>
3951GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetModulesInfo(
3952 llvm::ArrayRef<FileSpec> module_file_specs, const llvm::Triple &triple) {
3953 namespace json = llvm::json;
3954
3955 if (!m_supports_jModulesInfo)
3956 return std::nullopt;
3957
3958 json::Array module_array;
3959 for (const FileSpec &module_file_spec : module_file_specs) {
3960 module_array.push_back(
3961 json::Object{{"file", module_file_spec.GetPath(false)},
3962 {"triple", triple.getTriple()}});
3963 }
3964 StreamString unescaped_payload;
3965 unescaped_payload.PutCString("jModulesInfo:");
3966 unescaped_payload.AsRawOstream() << std::move(module_array);
3967
3968 StreamGDBRemote payload;
3969 payload.PutEscapedBytes(unescaped_payload.GetString().data(),
3970 unescaped_payload.GetSize());
3971
3972 // Increase the timeout for jModulesInfo since this packet can take longer.
3973 ScopedTimeout timeout(*this, std::chrono::seconds(10));
3974
3975 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
3976 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(payload.GetString(), response) !=
3977 PacketResult::Success ||
3978 response.IsErrorResponse())
3979 return std::nullopt;
3980
3981 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse()) {
3982 m_supports_jModulesInfo = false;
3983 return std::nullopt;
3984 }
3985
3986 StructuredData::ObjectSP response_object_sp =
3987 StructuredData::ParseJSON(response.GetStringRef());
3988 if (!response_object_sp)
3989 return std::nullopt;
3990
3991 StructuredData::Array *response_array = response_object_sp->GetAsArray();
3992 if (!response_array)
3993 return std::nullopt;
3994
3995 std::vector<ModuleSpec> result;
3996 for (size_t i = 0; i < response_array->GetSize(); ++i) {
3997 if (std::optional<ModuleSpec> module_spec = ParseModuleSpec(
3998 response_array->GetItemAtIndex(i)->GetAsDictionary()))
3999 result.push_back(*module_spec);
4000 }
4001
4002 return result;
4003}
4004
4005// query the target remote for extended information using the qXfer packet
4006//
4007// example: object='features', annex='target.xml'
4008// return: <xml output> or error
4009llvm::Expected<std::string>
4010GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::ReadExtFeature(llvm::StringRef object,
4011 llvm::StringRef annex) {
4012
4013 std::string output;
4014 llvm::raw_string_ostream output_stream(output);
4015 StringExtractorGDBRemote chunk;
4016
4017 uint64_t size = GetRemoteMaxPacketSize();
4018 if (size == 0)
4019 size = 0x1000;
4020 size = size - 1; // Leave space for the 'm' or 'l' character in the response
4021 int offset = 0;
4022 bool active = true;
4023
4024 // loop until all data has been read
4025 while (active) {
4026
4027 // send query extended feature packet
4028 std::string packet =
4029 ("qXfer:" + object + ":read:" + annex + ":" +
4030 llvm::Twine::utohexstr(offset) + "," + llvm::Twine::utohexstr(size))
4031 .str();
4032
4033 GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult res =
4034 SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet, chunk);
4035
4036 if (res != GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success ||
4037 chunk.GetStringRef().empty()) {
4038 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
4039 "Error sending $qXfer packet");
4040 }
4041
4042 // check packet code
4043 switch (chunk.GetStringRef()[0]) {
4044 // last chunk
4045 case ('l'):
4046 active = false;
4047 [[fallthrough]];
4048
4049 // more chunks
4050 case ('m'):
4051 output_stream << chunk.GetStringRef().drop_front();
4052 offset += chunk.GetStringRef().size() - 1;
4053 break;
4054
4055 // unknown chunk
4056 default:
4057 return llvm::createStringError(
4058 llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
4059 "Invalid continuation code from $qXfer packet");
4060 }
4061 }
4062
4063 return output;
4064}
4065
4066// Notify the target that gdb is prepared to serve symbol lookup requests.
4067// packet: "qSymbol::"
4068// reply:
4069// OK The target does not need to look up any (more) symbols.
4070// qSymbol:<sym_name> The target requests the value of symbol sym_name (hex
4071// encoded).
4072// LLDB may provide the value by sending another qSymbol
4073// packet
4074// in the form of"qSymbol:<sym_value>:<sym_name>".
4075//
4076// Three examples:
4077//
4078// lldb sends: qSymbol::
4079// lldb receives: OK
4080// Remote gdb stub does not need to know the addresses of any symbols, lldb
4081// does not
4082// need to ask again in this session.
4083//
4084// lldb sends: qSymbol::
4085// lldb receives: qSymbol:64697370617463685f71756575655f6f666673657473
4086// lldb sends: qSymbol::64697370617463685f71756575655f6f666673657473
4087// lldb receives: OK
4088// Remote gdb stub asks for address of 'dispatch_queue_offsets'. lldb does
4089// not know
4090// the address at this time. lldb needs to send qSymbol:: again when it has
4091// more
4092// solibs loaded.
4093//
4094// lldb sends: qSymbol::
4095// lldb receives: qSymbol:64697370617463685f71756575655f6f666673657473
4096// lldb sends: qSymbol:2bc97554:64697370617463685f71756575655f6f666673657473
4097// lldb receives: OK
4098// Remote gdb stub asks for address of 'dispatch_queue_offsets'. lldb says
4099// that it
4100// is at address 0x2bc97554. Remote gdb stub sends 'OK' indicating that it
4101// does not
4102// need any more symbols. lldb does not need to ask again in this session.
4103
4104void GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::ServeSymbolLookups(
4105 lldb_private::Process *process) {
4106 // Set to true once we've resolved a symbol to an address for the remote
4107 // stub. If we get an 'OK' response after this, the remote stub doesn't need
4108 // any more symbols and we can stop asking.
4109 bool symbol_response_provided = false;
4110
4111 // Is this the initial qSymbol:: packet?
4112 bool first_qsymbol_query = true;
4113
4114 if (m_supports_qSymbol && !m_qSymbol_requests_done) {
4115 Lock lock(*this);
4116 if (lock) {
4117 StreamString packet;
4118 packet.PutCString("qSymbol::");
4119 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
4120 while (SendPacketAndWaitForResponseNoLock(packet.GetString(), response) ==
4121 PacketResult::Success) {
4122 if (response.IsOKResponse()) {
4123 if (symbol_response_provided || first_qsymbol_query) {
4124 m_qSymbol_requests_done = true;
4125 }
4126
4127 // We are done serving symbols requests
4128 return;
4129 }
4130 first_qsymbol_query = false;
4131
4132 if (response.IsUnsupportedResponse()) {
4133 // qSymbol is not supported by the current GDB server we are
4134 // connected to
4135 m_supports_qSymbol = false;
4136 return;
4137 } else {
4138 llvm::StringRef response_str(response.GetStringRef());
4139 if (response_str.starts_with("qSymbol:")) {
4140 response.SetFilePos(strlen("qSymbol:"));
4141 std::string symbol_name;
4142 if (response.GetHexByteString(symbol_name)) {
4143 if (symbol_name.empty())
4144 return;
4145
4146 addr_t symbol_load_addr = LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS;
4147 lldb_private::SymbolContextList sc_list;
4148 process->GetTarget().GetImages().FindSymbolsWithNameAndType(
4149 ConstString(symbol_name), eSymbolTypeAny, sc_list);
4150 for (const SymbolContext &sc : sc_list) {
4151 if (symbol_load_addr != LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS)
4152 break;
4153 if (sc.symbol) {
4154 switch (sc.symbol->GetType()) {
4155 case eSymbolTypeInvalid:
4156 case eSymbolTypeAbsolute:
4157 case eSymbolTypeUndefined:
4158 case eSymbolTypeSourceFile:
4159 case eSymbolTypeHeaderFile:
4160 case eSymbolTypeObjectFile:
4161 case eSymbolTypeCommonBlock:
4162 case eSymbolTypeBlock:
4163 case eSymbolTypeLocal:
4164 case eSymbolTypeParam:
4165 case eSymbolTypeVariable:
4166 case eSymbolTypeVariableType:
4167 case eSymbolTypeLineEntry:
4168 case eSymbolTypeLineHeader:
4169 case eSymbolTypeScopeBegin:
4170 case eSymbolTypeScopeEnd:
4171 case eSymbolTypeAdditional:
4172 case eSymbolTypeCompiler:
4173 case eSymbolTypeInstrumentation:
4174 case eSymbolTypeTrampoline:
4175 break;
4176
4177 case eSymbolTypeCode:
4178 case eSymbolTypeResolver:
4179 case eSymbolTypeData:
4180 case eSymbolTypeRuntime:
4181 case eSymbolTypeException:
4182 case eSymbolTypeObjCClass:
4183 case eSymbolTypeObjCMetaClass:
4184 case eSymbolTypeObjCIVar:
4185 case eSymbolTypeReExported:
4186 symbol_load_addr =
4187 sc.symbol->GetLoadAddress(&process->GetTarget());
4188 break;
4189 }
4190 }
4191 }
4192 // This is the normal path where our symbol lookup was successful
4193 // and we want to send a packet with the new symbol value and see
4194 // if another lookup needs to be done.
4195
4196 // Change "packet" to contain the requested symbol value and name
4197 packet.Clear();
4198 packet.PutCString("qSymbol:");
4199 if (symbol_load_addr != LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS) {
4200 packet.Printf("%" PRIx64, symbol_load_addr);
4201 symbol_response_provided = true;
4202 } else {
4203 symbol_response_provided = false;
4204 }
4205 packet.PutCString(":");
4206 packet.PutBytesAsRawHex8(symbol_name.data(), symbol_name.size());
4207 continue; // go back to the while loop and send "packet" and wait
4208 // for another response
4209 }
4210 }
4211 }
4212 }
4213 // If we make it here, the symbol request packet response wasn't valid or
4214 // our symbol lookup failed so we must abort
4215 return;
4216
4217 } else if (Log *log = GetLog(GDBRLog::Process | GDBRLog::Packets)) {
4218 LLDB_LOGF(log,
4219 "GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::%s: Didn't get sequence mutex.",
4220 __FUNCTION__);
4221 }
4222 }
4223}
4224
4225StructuredData::Array *
4226GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::GetSupportedStructuredDataPlugins() {
4227 if (!m_supported_async_json_packets_is_valid) {
4228 // Query the server for the array of supported asynchronous JSON packets.
4229 m_supported_async_json_packets_is_valid = true;
4230
4231 Log *log = GetLog(GDBRLog::Process);
4232
4233 // Poll it now.
4234 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
4235 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse("qStructuredDataPlugins", response) ==
4236 PacketResult::Success) {
4237 m_supported_async_json_packets_sp =
4238 StructuredData::ParseJSON(response.GetStringRef());
4239 if (m_supported_async_json_packets_sp &&
4240 !m_supported_async_json_packets_sp->GetAsArray()) {
4241 // We were returned something other than a JSON array. This is
4242 // invalid. Clear it out.
4243 LLDB_LOGF(log,
4244 "GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::%s(): "
4245 "QSupportedAsyncJSONPackets returned invalid "
4246 "result: %s",
4247 __FUNCTION__, response.GetStringRef().data());
4248 m_supported_async_json_packets_sp.reset();
4249 }
4250 } else {
4251 LLDB_LOGF(log,
4252 "GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::%s(): "
4253 "QSupportedAsyncJSONPackets unsupported",
4254 __FUNCTION__);
4255 }
4256
4257 if (log && m_supported_async_json_packets_sp) {
4258 StreamString stream;
4259 m_supported_async_json_packets_sp->Dump(stream);
4260 LLDB_LOGF(log,
4261 "GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::%s(): supported async "
4262 "JSON packets: %s",
4263 __FUNCTION__, stream.GetData());
4264 }
4265 }
4266
4267 return m_supported_async_json_packets_sp
4268 ? m_supported_async_json_packets_sp->GetAsArray()
4269 : nullptr;
4270}
4271
4272Status GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::SendSignalsToIgnore(
4273 llvm::ArrayRef<int32_t> signals) {
4274 // Format packet:
4275 // QPassSignals:<hex_sig1>;<hex_sig2>...;<hex_sigN>
4276 auto range = llvm::make_range(signals.begin(), signals.end());
4277 std::string packet = formatv("QPassSignals:{0:$[;]@(x-2)}", range).str();
4278
4279 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
4280 auto send_status = SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(packet, response);
4281
4282 if (send_status != GDBRemoteCommunication::PacketResult::Success)
4283 return Status::FromErrorString("Sending QPassSignals packet failed");
4284
4285 if (response.IsOKResponse()) {
4286 return Status();
4287 } else {
4288 return Status::FromErrorString(
4289 "Unknown error happened during sending QPassSignals packet.");
4290 }
4291}
4292
4293Status GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::ConfigureRemoteStructuredData(
4294 llvm::StringRef type_name, const StructuredData::ObjectSP &config_sp) {
4295 Status error;
4296
4297 if (type_name.empty()) {
4298 error = Status::FromErrorString("invalid type_name argument");
4299 return error;
4300 }
4301
4302 // Build command: Configure{type_name}: serialized config data.
4303 StreamGDBRemote stream;
4304 stream.PutCString("QConfigure");
4305 stream.PutCString(type_name);
4306 stream.PutChar(':');
4307 if (config_sp) {
4308 // Gather the plain-text version of the configuration data.
4309 StreamString unescaped_stream;
4310 config_sp->Dump(unescaped_stream);
4311 unescaped_stream.Flush();
4312
4313 // Add it to the stream in escaped fashion.
4314 stream.PutEscapedBytes(unescaped_stream.GetString().data(),
4315 unescaped_stream.GetSize());
4316 }
4317 stream.Flush();
4318
4319 // Send the packet.
4320 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
4321 auto result = SendPacketAndWaitForResponse(stream.GetString(), response);
4322 if (result == PacketResult::Success) {
4323 // We failed if the config result comes back other than OK.
4324 if (response.GetStringRef() == "OK") {
4325 // Okay!
4326 error.Clear();
4327 } else {
4328 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormatv(
4329 "configuring StructuredData feature {0} failed with error {1}",
4330 type_name, response.GetStringRef());
4331 }
4332 } else {
4333 // Can we get more data here on the failure?
4334 error = Status::FromErrorStringWithFormatv(
4335 "configuring StructuredData feature {0} failed when sending packet: "
4336 "PacketResult={1}",
4337 type_name, (int)result);
4338 }
4339 return error;
4340}
4341
4342void GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::OnRunPacketSent(bool first) {
4343 GDBRemoteClientBase::OnRunPacketSent(first);
4344 m_curr_tid = LLDB_INVALID_THREAD_ID;
4345}
4346
4347bool GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::UsesNativeSignals() {
4348 if (m_uses_native_signals == eLazyBoolCalculate)
4349 GetRemoteQSupported();
4350 if (m_uses_native_signals == eLazyBoolYes)
4351 return true;
4352
4353 // If the remote didn't indicate native-signal support explicitly,
4354 // check whether it is an old version of lldb-server.
4355 return GetThreadSuffixSupported();
4356}
4357
4358llvm::Expected<int> GDBRemoteCommunicationClient::KillProcess(lldb::pid_t pid) {
4359 StringExtractorGDBRemote response;
4360 GDBRemoteCommunication::ScopedTimeout(*this, seconds(3));
4361
4362 // LLDB server typically sends no response for "k", so we shouldn't try
4363 // to sync on timeout.
4364 if (SendPacketAndWaitForResponse("k", response, GetPacketTimeout(), false) !=
4365 PacketResult::Success)
4366 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
4367 "failed to send k packet");
4368
4369 char packet_cmd = response.GetChar(0);
4370 if (packet_cmd == 'W' || packet_cmd == 'X')
4371 return response.GetHexU8();
4372
4373 return llvm::createStringError(llvm::inconvertibleErrorCode(),
4374 "unexpected response to k packet: %s",
4375 response.GetStringRef().str().c_str());
4376}
Args.h
error
static llvm::raw_ostream & error(Stream &strm)
Definition CommandReturnObject.cpp:18
DataBufferHeap.h
integer
#define integer
Definition EmulateInstructionARM64.cpp:75
calculate_standard_deviation
duration< float > calculate_standard_deviation(const std::vector< duration< float > > &v)
Definition GDBRemoteCommunicationClient.cpp:2472
ParseModuleSpec
static std::optional< ModuleSpec > ParseModuleSpec(StructuredData::Dictionary *dict)
Definition GDBRemoteCommunicationClient.cpp:3918
gdb_errno_to_system
static int gdb_errno_to_system(int err)
Definition GDBRemoteCommunicationClient.cpp:3076
